{{Infobox character
| name = Timaias Adama
| aliases = Adama
| species = Remnant
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|soulfire-infused flesh}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Sage]], [[Sword Sage]], [[Sage of the Endless Sword]]}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Heaven’s Glory School]]}}
| residence = {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Heaven’s Glory School]]}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Wintersteel (novel)|Wintersteel]]
}}

''See also: [[Timaias Adama Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Timaias Adama, also known as Adama, was a powerful figure who held the rank of [[Sage]]. During his time as a guest at the [[Heaven’s Glory School]], he maintained a sense of disdain for the school's elders, who mistakenly believed his rank was merely that of a [[Gold]]. Despite being physically weakened, he possessed a Steelborn [[Iron body]] and utilized advanced swordplay to defend himself against opponents armed with makeshift weapons. Adama eventually died during a confrontation involving [[Yerin]], sacrificing his life for hers. Following his death, [[Yerin]] inherited his [[Remnant]], an inheritance that carries the potential for her to become his true successor once she reaches the level of [[Archlord]].}}

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Yerin]] took Adama's [[Remnant]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c18">''Uncrowned'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Adama gave his life for [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c18" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Sword Sage]], also known as the [[Sage of the Endless Sword]], has spent nearly three months as a guest at the [[Heaven’s Glory School]]. This [[Sage]] possesses an [[Archlord]] body, a Steelborn [[Iron body]], and flesh infused with [[soulfire]]. Carrying a [[wintersteel]] blade, Timaias Adama maintains a void space containing experimental materials and ancient research notes. While [[Yerin]] questioned if her fighting style originated from Adama's [[Remnant]], it is noted that the [[Sage]] would not have permitted her [[Blood Shadow]] to reach its current state. Should [[Yerin]] achieve the rank of [[Archlord]], she is destined to become Adama's true successor.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">12</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Timaias Adama]] has been a guest of the [[Heaven’s Glory School]] for almost three months.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c1">''Wintersteel'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Timaias Adama]] is a [[Sage]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Timaias Adama]] possesses [[soulfire]]-infused flesh.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Timaias Adama]] uses a [[wintersteel]] blade.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Adama is the [[Sword Sage]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Adama has a void space filled with ancient research notes and experimental materials.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Adama has an [[Archlord]] body.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Adama has a Steelborn [[Iron body]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Adama is the [[Sage of the Endless Sword]] and uses the title of the [[Sword Sage]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7">''Wintersteel'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] asks if her fighting style came from Adama's [[Remnant]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8">''Wintersteel'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] is destined to be Adama�s true successor if she reaches [[Archlord]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17">''Wintersteel'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Adama would not have allowed [[Yerin's Blood Shadow]] to develop to its current point.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18">''Wintersteel'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“Adama would never have allowed your Blood Shadow to develop to this point,” the Winter Sage said with certainty.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Heaven’s Glory School]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Remnants]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
